title: centaurea × confusa
intro: Centaurea × confusa is a hybrid plant species belonging to the daisy family, derived from the cross between Cornflower (Centaurea cyanus) and a species of knapweed. The medicinal properties of Centaurea × confusa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × confusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
